name: Brandon Roby Golf
about: Brandon Roby Golf is an indoor golf training center and performance studio in West Michigan. The facility features six Trackman simulator bays, a 1,300-square-foot putting green, and a 270-square-foot PuttView putting green. It offers unlimited simulator and putting green access for members, along with personalized coaching from a PGA Professional. The center aims to transform practice sessions into purposeful training through technology and data analysis, focusing on enhancing consistency, accuracy, and overall play for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to six Trackman simulator bays for precise shot data
Personalized coaching from a PGA Professional to create custom practice plans
Unlimited simulator and putting green access for members

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Six simulator bays powered by Trackman technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers are expected to bring their own clubs to use with the simulators and putting greens.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a BYOB policy or food service, so it's recommended to inquire directly about outside food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for 18 holes, as it depends on simulator usage and booking.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Brandon Roby Golf caters to juniors and youth with specialized programs and instruction for young golfers.
